scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core && tsc --noEmit -p packages/app && tsc --noEmit -p packages/app/tsconfig.worker.json && bun run --filter @sideset/branding typecheck && bun run --filter @sideset/site typecheck
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: bun test packages/core && bun run --filter @sideset/branding test:unit && bun run --filter @sideset/site test:unit
scripts.test:integration: bun test packages/app && bun run --filter @sideset/branding test:integration && bun run --filter @sideset/site test:integration
scripts.test:coverage: bun test packages/core packages/app --coverage && bun run --filter @sideset/branding test:coverage && bun run --filter @sideset/site test:coverage
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test && bun run --filter @sideset/site test:build
